title: Harbinger (Mon Calamari Star Cruiser)

{{Quote|Generals Farlander and Celchu have the enemy boxed in. ''Harbinger'' has dropped from hyperspace and is pressing forward at battle speed to rendezvous with ''Elegos A'Kla'' at rally point manka-flechette-dewback.|''Mon Mothma''{{'s}} commander, during the Battle of Corulag|<ref name="Force" />}}
'''''Harbinger''''' was a heavily armed [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] that served as [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]]' [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] in the later part of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Initially guarding the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tallaan]] from [[Yuuzhan Vong]] attack, ''Harbinger'' participated in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Battle of Ebaq|rout]] of Yuuzhan Vong forces in the [[Treskov system]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]. The [[Star Cruiser/Legends|Star Cruiser]] later aided the New Republic's successor state, the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], in [[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|defending]] the planet [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] from a [[Yuuzhan Vong fleet|Yuuzhan Vong armada]] in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]. ''Harbinger'' and the Galactic Alliance [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet|forces]] met the armada at the [[Mon Calamari Extreme|edge]] of the [[Mon Calamari system/Legends|Mon Calamari system]], where the Star Cruiser made good use of its heavy weaponry. Following the battle, Bel Iblis and ''Harbinger'' joined Galactic Alliance [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet|fleet]] elements in [[Battle of Corulag (Yuuzhan Vong War)|liberating]] the planet [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] from the Yuuzhan Vong.

==Description==
A [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]],<ref name="Way" /> ''Harbinger'' was heavily armed with long-range weapons.<ref name="Force" /> It possessed a command [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]], [[Engine/Legends|engines]],<ref name="Way" /> a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] system, and [[Life support/Legends|life support]].<ref name="Force" />

==History==
{{Quote|Dovin basal singularities have been diverted to the forefront of the armada. Destroyers will be attacking the flanks in an attempt to induce the dovin basals to shift focus, so that ''Harbinger'', ''Guardian'', and ''Viscount'' can resume fire.|Galactic Alliance control, during the Defense of Mon Calamari|<ref name="Force" />}}
In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]],<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], in which the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaded [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], ''Harbinger'' served as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] elements used by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]–allied<ref name="Way" /> [[General/Legends|General]]<ref name="Force" /> [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] to guard the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tallaan]] against the invaders. ''Harbinger'' traveled alongside half of the fleet from Talaan as Bel Iblis answered [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] call to aid the New Republic in creating a trap for the Yuuzhan Vong in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core's]] [[Treskov system]], near the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Ebaq 9]]. Once the [[Yuuzhan Vong fleet]] was lured into the [[Star system/Legends|system]], Skywalker, from ''Harbinger''{{'s}} bridge, led the [[Starship/Legends|ships]] from Bel Iblis' force as well as a group from the [[Smugglers' Alliance]] coalition in engaging the Yuuzhan Vong's [[Battle Group of Yun-Q'aah]] in one facet of the [[Battle of Ebaq]]. The battle ended in a victory for the New Republic [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|forces]], with Yuuzhan Vong [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]] being [[Death/Legends|killed]] during the fighting. At the end of the battle, New Republic [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Sien Sovv]] made his report from the ''Harbinger''.<ref name="Way" />

[[File:GarmBelIblis-DFR3.jpg|thumb|right|250px|''Harbinger'' was Garm Bel Iblis' flagship.]]
''Harbinger'' was later one of the multitude of [[Warship/Legends|warships]] that gathered near the planet [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] to aid the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], the New Republic's successor state, in defending the [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]] world from a massing Yuuzhan Vong armada<ref name="Force" /> in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]].<ref name="ERC" /> At the [[Mon Calamari Extreme|edge]] of the [[Mon Calamari system/Legends|Mon Calamari system]], ''Harbinger'' and the Galactic Alliance [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet|forces]] encountered the enemy armada, which shaped itself like a [[yammosk]], a tentacled creature with [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathic]] capabilities. After Galactic Alliance [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] opened up holes in the arms of the armada that were formed by lighter Yuuzhan Vong vessels, ''Harbinger'' and the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Guardian (Executor-class)|''Guardian'']] pummeled the Yuuzhan Vong [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] in the heart of the armada with their long-range weaponry through the opened firing lanes. As the fighting progressed, the Yuuzhan Vong armada deployed the [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielding]] effects of its [[dovin basal]]s between itself and ''Harbinger'', ''Guardian'', and the<ref name="Force" /> [[Viscount-class Star Defender|''Viscount''-class Star Defender]]<ref name="Prime">''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''</ref> [[Viscount (Viscount-class)|''Viscount'']], sparing the armada from the weapons of the trio of [[Battleship/Legends|battleships]].<ref name="Force" />

In an effort to change the focus of the dovin basals, Galactic Alliance [[Bomber/Legends|bombers]] infiltrated the armada, which forced the Yuuzhan Vong to defend themselves on a different front. Because of the resulting shift in defenses, ''Harbinger'' and ''Guardian'' were able to freely target the poorly defended arms of the armada with their weapons, destroying multiple [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]] and [[Picket ship/Legends|picket ships]]. Not long after, the Yuuzhan Vong armada withdrew from the combat zone. Following the action in the Mon Calamari system, Bel Iblis and ''Harbinger'' accompanied a battle group that included the<ref name="Force" /> [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]]<ref name="Queen">''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]''</ref> [[Mon Mothma (Imperial-class)|''Mon Mothma'']] and [[Elegos A'Kla (Imperial-class)|''Elegos A'Kla'']], as well as the<ref name="Force" /> [[MC80B Star Cruiser]]<ref name="Way" /> ''[[Mon Adapyne]]'', to the Yuuzhan Vong–held world of [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] to [[Battle of Corulag (Yuuzhan Vong War)|liberate]] it in a surprise attack. Traveling with the rest of the battle group from the planet [[Contruum/Legends|Contruum]], ''Harbinger'' decanted from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] close to Corulag after the other three Galactic Alliance warships and rendezvoused with ''Elegos A'Kla''.<ref name="Force" />

With the help of the other capital ships, ''Harbinger'' boxed in the Yuuzhan Vong vessels, and the resulting crossfire destroyed many of the enemy coralskippers. During the fighting, Yuuzhan Vong–allied [[Peace Brigade]] [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] fighters launched from Corulag, and General [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]], who was commanding ''Elegos A'kla'', was assigned to deal with them, with ''Harbinger'' to aid Celchu if needed. In the end, Corulag was liberated from the Yuuzhan Vong,<ref name="Force" /> with ''Harbinger'' playing an important role in the fighting.<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|II|17|''Harbinger'' (3)}}</ref>

==Commanders and crew==
''Harbinger''{{'s}} [[Commanding officer/Legends|commander]] was the<ref name="Force" /> [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]]<ref name="egtc">''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref> General<ref name="Force" /> Garm Bel Iblis, who used the [[Star Cruiser/Legends|Star Cruiser]] as his flagship as he fought against the Yuuzhan Vong during the later part of the war.<ref name="Way" />

==Behind the scenes==
''Harbinger'' first appeared in [[Walter Jon Williams]]' [[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way|''Destiny's Way'']], a [[2002]] installment of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series of novels.<ref name="Way" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
